revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:護国神社, en:Gokoku shrines); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gokoku_Shrines here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gokoku_Shrines for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/86361728 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:護国神社 | revid=86361728 --> == 漢字表記について == 全国の護国神社の項目で、神社名が全て護"國"に統一されていますが、実際には護"国"表記で通されている神社もあります。 また、このページも「護"国"神社」というページです。 常用外?の「國」での"護國"表記は、その神社で正式にその名称を現在でも利用している場合など以外は控える方が良いように思うのですが如何でしょうか? --[[User:Chestnut|Chestnut]] 2007年08月19日 (日) 02:50 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1260871145 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Gokoku shrines | revid=1260871145 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=low}} }}
